But basically, their emails about nothing.
They're pushing people to either your primary offer, or to one of your other offers, or up to your back end offers.
And they kind of rotate around.
Usually I'll spend maybe a week or two weeks or three weeks, I'll focus on one offer, and I'll switch to another offer, and I'll switch back to the other one.
And just every day, you need emailing your list as often as you're, as you're, you're willing to get a lot of people are going to be scared to death email their list.

So email them once a month.
And then finally, somebody told me like, man, you never email your list, and you email more often.

I'm more than double my income again.

I have one friend who actually emails six times a day, which I personally think is a little crazy, but he gets with it and makes millions of dollars.

But I definitely say at least once a day, you should be emailing your list in most markets.

I've got like $35 worth of juice in my stomach right now and that's a lot of money.

I'm able to buy Suja juice whenever I want just because I want it and $7 a bottle may be a lot, but because I'm an online business, I'm able to buy it.
